title: Incorrect results for combination of MINUS and VALUES
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of MINUS with VALUES clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT NOT NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IN (0, 1) MINUS (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value = 1);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO another_table (id, description) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
